[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, stylized face of a cartoon-like character with large eyes and a protective-looking face covering fills the frame.

Main Subject:
The image shows a rounded, human-like cartoon head with short brown hair and oversized eyes that have dark pupils and light highlights. The character wears a yellow face covering over the lower face, with a blue patch-like area near the right side of the mouth area. The figure also has two gray, blocky hands positioned near the bottom of the image.

Setting:
The background is plain white, with no visible environment details.

Visual Details:
The composition is centered and tightly cropped around the character’s head and hands. Colors are mainly brown (hair), yellow and blue (face covering), and gray (hands). Lighting appears flat and even, with a soft, slightly blurry or pixelated look typical of a low-resolution image.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
This image shows a cartoon character head with large eyes and a yellow-and-blue face covering. The figure’s gray hands are visible at the bottom against a plain white background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
